# TNS AI Docs

> Documentation portal for the TNS AI application ecosystem. The flagship
> application is EcoData, a professional economic and financial data platform
> for research and publication. The portal also documents EcoLab (quantitative
> analysis), EcoLit (academic literature search), PDFHUB (document parsing and
> financial RAG) and KEYWORDs (keyword monitoring and semantic analysis).
> Primary language: Vietnamese, with English available.

## EcoData — economic & financial data platform

- [EcoData overview](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/overview): What EcoData is, who it is for, the core data groups, and the standard research workflow.
- [Getting started: Login -> Filter/Select -> Preview -> Export](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/bat-dau/login-filter-preview-export): End-to-end flow for finding, previewing and exporting a dataset with metadata.
- [Data source groups](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/nguon-du-lieu/phan-nhom-nguon-du-lieu): How sources are organized by unit of analysis (country, province, firm, commodity, household, individual).

### EcoData data catalogue

- [Indicators overview](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/indicators/tong-hop-indicators): Full indicator catalogue, short-code naming system and metadata model.
- [Global Data](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/indicators/global-data): International macro indicators (World Bank, IMF, ADB, UN, FRED, OECD, ILO, Eurostat, WTO).
- [GSO Vietnam](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/indicators/gso-vietnam): Vietnam official statistics — Statistical Yearbook, socio-economic reports, national and provincial series.
- [Customs](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/indicators/customs): Import/export data by commodity, partner country, province and transport mode.
- [Macro Survey & VHLSS](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/indicators/macro-survey-vhlss): Governance surveys (PCI, PAPI, ICT, PAR, SIPAS) and VHLSS household microdata.
- [Stock Hub](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/indicators/stock-hub): Vietnam listed-company prices, profiles, financial statements, notes and event calendars.

### EcoData tools

- [AI Chat](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/cong-cu/ai-chat): Assistant for suggesting indicators, sources and model variables, and exporting data.
- [Econometric analysis](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/cong-cu/econometrics): Estimate and test models (OLS, WLS, GLS, panel, VAR, ARIMA, Logit, Probit, ...) and export reproducible Stata/R/Python code.
- [Preview & export data](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/xuat-du-lieu/preview-export): Export formats, per-plan export limits and the metadata bundled with downloads.

## Other TNS AI applications

- [EcoLab overview](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecolab/overview): Quantitative analysis and econometric modeling with RAG and knowledge graphs.
- [EcoLit overview](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecolit/overview): Academic literature search across OpenAlex, Crossref and ORCID.
- [PDFHUB overview](https://docs.tnsai.vn/pdfhub/overview): Document parsing, prompt caching and agentic financial RAG.
- [KEYWORDs overview](https://docs.tnsai.vn/keywords/overview): Keyword monitoring, crawling and semantic analysis.

## Optional

- [EcoData admin: data management](https://docs.tnsai.vn/ecodata/admin/quan-tri-du-lieu): How data is ingested, validated and maintained.
- The application itself: [https://ecodata.io.vn](https://ecodata.io.vn) (its own /llms.txt and /sitemap.xml describe the interactive app).
